overview: Anti-Aging Medical Group specializes in Bioidentical Hormone Replacement Therapy (BHRT) for menopause, perimenopause, PMS/PMDD, and low testosterone. The clinic offers customized treatment plans through in-person visits at two locations or via telemedicine in select states.
highlights: Telemedicine consultations in California, Nevada, Colorado, and Illinois
Individualized treatment plans for each patient
targetAudience: Adults seeking hormone replacement therapy, particularly women with menopause and men with low testosterone.
